channel.title: Cookie-Consent on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Cookie-Consent on Pi Stack

item.title: Klaro! vs Tarteaucitron vs CookieConsent: Self-Hosted Cookie Consent Managers 2026
item.description: Every website that serves visitors in the European Union must comply with the ePrivacy Directive (commonly called the “EU Cookie Law”) and the GDPR. If you self-host your websites — whether it’s a Hugo blog, a Next.js app, or a WordPress instance — you are responsible for ensuring cookie consent compliance. Commercial solutions like Cookiebot or OneTrust require external CDN calls and third-party scripts that undermine the privacy goals of self-hosting.
